pi_items.source: Task description specifies saving to exactly this filename
Task description explicitly requires saving to this path
Task description requires 'Sound Boxes' as title. Web search confirms Sound Boxes (Elkonin Boxes) is established educational activity for phonemic awareness in kindergarten.
Task requires 3 boxes for Cat (3 phonemes: /k/ /æ/ /t/) + 4 boxes for Frog (4 phonemes: /f/ /r/ /ɒ/ /g/). Web search verified phoneme counts.
Task description specifies 'at least 5 red circular chips (using the shape tool) at the bottom of the page for students to use as counters'

Task description specifies importing cat.jpg and frog.jpg. setup_task.sh references Wikimedia URLs: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3a/Cat03.jpg/320px-Cat03.jpg and https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/18/Rana_catesbeiana_02.jpg/320px-Rana_catesbeiana_02.jpg. Web search confirmed Rana catesbeiana (bullfrog) is real species with images available on Wikimedia Commons.
Web search confirmed that .flipchart is the standard extension for ActivInspire presentations by Promethean. export_result.sh uses unzip to extract content, indicating ZIP archive format.
Web search confirmed ActivInspire is real educational software by Promethean that creates .flipchart format presentations for interactive whiteboards.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating a Sound Boxes (Elkonin Boxes) phonemic awareness activity in ActivInspire, a real educational software by Promethean. The task requires importing images of a cat and frog, and adding sound boxes (3 for cat's 3 phonemes: /k/ /æ/ /t/; 4 for frog's 4 phonemes: /f/ /r/ /ɒ/ /g/) plus 5 red circular counters. The setup script references real Wikimedia Commons images or generates placeholders as fallback. The output is a .flipchart format file (ZIP archive with embedded XML) saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/phonemic_awareness.flipchart. All metadata values match verified facts about phonemic awareness pedagogy, software specifications, and file formats.
